title: papaver argemone subsp. belangeri
intro: Papaver argemone subsp. belangeri, also known as the prickly poppy or Argemone mexicana, is a plant species within the Papaveraceae family. It is a perennial herb native to the Americas, characterized by its bright orange-yellow flowers and distinctive seed pods covered with sharp spines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The seeds of Papaver argemone subsp. belangeri can be used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas or tinctures, which are believed to have health benefits, including relieving pain and reducing inflammation.
